# Level 9 — The Final Trial
# Boss arena design. Wide open floor for movement, but:
# - 4 enemies spawn across the arena (the player must clear all before reaching Vow Stone)
# - Two elevated side platforms with enemies that can "snipe" from range
# - Spike pits at both far ends — running too far = death
# - Centre floor is safe but flanked by enemies from above and sides
# - Vow Stone is in the dead centre, elevated on a 4-tile platform
#   requiring one clean jump in the middle of chaos
# - Walled sides (tall columns) create the arena feel — no escape left or right
# Width: 42 cols | Height: 22 rows

000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
